explanation: Created a comprehensive phone & tickets dashboard with live data from Freshcaller and Freshdesk. The dashboard shows today's call volume, ticket backlog, status breakdowns, and recent activity tables for immediate operational visibility.

widgets.title: Phone & Tickets Operations
widgets.subtitle: Today's call volume and support ticket activity

widgets.title: Key Insight
widgets.subtitle: Monitor call completion rates and ticket response times to ensure optimal customer experience across all channels.

quickActions.label: Add Call Volume Trend
quickActions.prompt: Add a time series chart showing call volume over the past week

quickActions.label: Add Ticket Priority Breakdown
quickActions.prompt: Add a chart showing ticket distribution by priority level

quickActions.label: Create Agent Performance View
quickActions.prompt: Add widgets showing individual agent call and ticket metrics
